nasb.text: Around the throne were twenty-four thrones; and upon the thrones I saw twenty-four elders sitting, clothed in white garments, and golden crowns on their heads.

esv.text: Around the throne were twenty-four thrones, and seated on the thrones were twenty-four elders, clothed in white garments, with golden crowns on their heads.

cnv.text: 寶座的周圍有二十四個座位，上面坐著二十四位長老，身穿白衣，頭戴金冠。

ccb.text: 宝座的周围设有二十四个座位，有二十四位长老坐在上面，他们身穿白袍，头戴金冠。

csbs.text: 座位的周围，还有二十四个座位；在那些宝座上，坐着二十四位长老，身穿白衣，头戴金冠冕；
